case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: checked checkoutservice latency metrics and traces; p50/p90 anomalies and internal Charge operation latency; implication: checkoutservice latency degradation
checkoutservice latency metrics and traces show p50/p90 anomalies; currencyservice latency also abnormal. Implication: checkoutservice degradation primary, currencyservice secondary.
